name: Use Claude's chat search and memory to build on previous context
snippet:
Additionally, Claude can remember context from previous chats, creating continuity across your conversations. This article introduces Claude's chat search and ...
Additionally, Claude can remember context from previous chats, creating continuity across your conversations. This article introduces Claude’s chat search and memory capabilities and explains how they work, what Claude can and can’t remember, and how you can toggle the features on/off.

name: Does Claude 'remember' between individual chats in the same project? - Reddit
snippet: Claude has no memory between chats, so you either need to put those facts in the project or use a MCP memory server/Obsidian vault etc. Claude retains memory between chats - weird? : r/claudexplorers Claude can now reference your previous conversations : r/ClaudeAI More results from www.reddit.com

name: How AI Chatbot Memory and Archiving Work - TechGenies
snippet: Claude can remember within a session and may store archived chats, but does not automatically recall history across sessions unless configured.

name: Anthropic lets Claude remember previous interactions to streamline work - SiliconANGLE
snippet: One month ago, Anthropic gave Claude the ability to remember past chats when prompted to do so, but now users won't need to ask. Claude's memory ...

name: Bringing memory to teams | Claude by Anthropic
snippet: To see memory in action, enable the feature in Settings, and let Claude generate memory with your past chats at initial set-up. Ask Claude questions like “what were we working on last week?” to see what Claude remembers across your existing chats and connected tools.
